params.name: Spencer's Microwave
params.description:
On Dec 24, 1945 AD, Engineer Spencer invented the world's first microwave oven.
This microwave oven was developed by American Radar Engineer Spencer. His idea came from a piece of chocolate that melted for no reason in his trouser pocket. After some research, he discovered that the reason the chocolate melted was due to a magnetron that could emit microwaves. Then he used that instrument to turn corn into popcorn and heat an egg until it exploded. Based on the scientific principle behind it, …
